title: SaladMC Modpack
description:
SaladMC is a minecraft server created for the saladchefs community by the community!

this modpack created in order to make it easier for players to be on the same page, with mods that are allowed on the server and make the game experience way better!
body:
![saladmc logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10bccba92267e2bf1ea818828bf5460cef83385c.png)
# SaladMC Official Modpack

### By the community for the community

SaladMC modpack is a simple Minecraft modpack focusing on performance, graphics enhancements and cool social features for our minecraft server.

### Performance
This modpack includes many performance focused mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others. just so it will be easier for any player to play on our server!

### Social
with mods like essentials you can take our server to another level! From private chats, group chats, emojis support in chat, and cosmetics this modpack has all of it!

### Works on other servers!
This modpack was created in mind of our own server but if you like it you can use it on any server you want as there is little to no content mods and it's mostly client side!

### Active and growing community!
our community might be small, but our passion is big and we are growing every day!

# 
## Huge thanks to cybrancee for helping us bring this server to our community!
![cybrancee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddcc2106fe6e61ac6243d275cbb03f7114f331f2.jpeg)
[get your server today and help us grow some trees!](https://salad.com/store/search?q=cybrancee%20minecraft&size=n_20_n)
